languages.text: "В ходе зачистки одной из пораженных чужаками планет наше отделение угодило в засаду. Кровь {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Сангвиния{/g}, мы стояли насмерть, но проиграли. Некроны не стали добивать раненых, забрав их в качестве трофеев. Причины мне неизвестны".

traits.locale_text: "В ходе зачистки одной из пораженных чужаками планет наше отделение угодило в засаду. Кровь {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Сангвиния{/g}, мы стояли насмерть... но проиграли. По неведомым причинам ксеносы не стали добивать раненых, забрав их в качестве трофеев. И вот... я здесь".

languages.text: "While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."
languages.original_text: "В ходе зачистки одной из пораженных чужаками планет наше отделение угодило в засаду. Кровь {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Сангвиния{/g}, мы стояли насмерть, но проиграли. Некроны не стали добивать раненых, забрав их в качестве трофеев. Причины мне неизвестны".

traits.locale_text: "While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."

"While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."

"While clearing out one of the alien-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of Sanguinius, we fought to the bitter end... but we lost. For some unknown reason, the metal xenos did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. And now... here I am."

"While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."

"While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."

languages.text: 「異星人の侵略を受けた惑星を掃討していた時、我々の部隊は奇襲を受けた。サンギニウスの血を継ぐ我々は最後まで戦い抜いた…しかし敗北した。何らかの理由で、金属製の異星人は負傷者を殺さず、代わりに捕虜にした。そして今…ここにいる」
languages.original_text: "While clearing out one of the alien-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of Sanguinius, we fought to the bitter end... but we lost. For some unknown reason, the metal xenos did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. And now... here I am."

traits.locale_text: 「異星人の侵略を受けた惑星を掃討していた時、我々の部隊は奇襲を受けた。サンギニウスの血を継ぐ我々は最後まで戦い抜いた…しかし敗北した。何らかの理由で、金属製の異星人は負傷者を殺さず、代わりに捕虜にした。そして今…ここにいる」

languages.text: «Mientras purgaba uno de los planetas infestados por xenos, nuestra unidad fue emboscada. Por la sangre de {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, luchamos hasta el fin, pero perdimos. Los Necrones no remataron a los heridos, sino que nos capturaron como trofeos. Desconozco el motivo».
languages.original_text: "While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."

traits.locale_text: «Mientras purgaba uno de los planetas infestados por xenos, nuestra unidad fue emboscada. Por la sangre de {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, luchamos hasta el fin, pero perdimos. Los Necrones no remataron a los heridos, sino que nos capturaron como trofeos. Desconozco el motivo».

languages.text: “我们在肃清一颗异形肆虐的行星时遭到伏击。{g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}圣吉列斯{/g}之血在上，我们死战到了最后一刻，但还是战败了。那些太空死灵并没有处决伤员，而是将他们当作战利品掳走了。至于原因，我也不清楚。”
languages.original_text: "While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."

traits.locale_text: “我们在肃清一颗异形肆虐的行星时遭到伏击。{g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}圣吉列斯{/g}之血在上，我们死战到了最后一刻，但还是战败了。那些太空死灵并没有处决伤员，而是将他们当作战利品掳走了。至于原因，我也不清楚。”

languages.text: "Unsere Einheit geriet bei der Säuberung eines von Xenos befallenen Planeten in einen Hinterhalt. Beim Blut von {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, wir haben bis zum bitteren Ende gekämpft, aber verloren. Die Necrons haben die Verwundeten nicht getötet, sondern als Trophäen behalten. Warum weiß ich nicht."
languages.original_text: "While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."

traits.locale_text: "Unsere Einheit geriet bei der Säuberung eines von Xenos befallenen Planeten in einen Hinterhalt. Beim Blut von {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, wir haben bis zum bitteren Ende gekämpft, aber verloren. Die Necrons haben die Verwundeten nicht getötet, sondern als Trophäen behalten. Warum weiß ich nicht."

languages.text: "Zeno istilasına uğramış gezegenlerden birini temizlerken birliğimiz pusuya düşürüldü. {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius'un{/g} kanı uğruna sonuna kadar savaştık... Kaybettik. Nekronlar, yaralıları öldürmeyip ganimet olarak aldı. Nedenini bilmiyorum."
languages.original_text: "While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno istilasına uğramış gezegenlerden birini temizlerken birliğimiz pusuya düşürüldü. {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius'un{/g} kanı uğruna sonuna kadar savaştık... Kaybettik. Nekronlar, yaralıları öldürmeyip ganimet olarak aldı. Nedenini bilmiyorum."

languages.text: « Notre unité a été prise en embuscade alors que nous nettoyions une planète infestée de xénos. Par le sang de {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, nous avons lutté sans relâche… mais en vain. Les Nécrons ont emporté les blessés comme trophées plutôt que de les achever sur place. J'ignore pourquoi. »
languages.original_text: "While clearing out one of the xenos-infested planets, our unit was ambushed. Blood of {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, we fought to the bitter end, but we lost. The Necrons did not finish off the wounded, instead taking them as trophies. Why, I do not know."

traits.locale_text: « Notre unité a été prise en embuscade alors que nous nettoyions une planète infestée de xénos. Par le sang de {g|Encyclopedia:SanguiniusGlossary}Sanguinius{/g}, nous avons lutté sans relâche… mais en vain. Les Nécrons ont emporté les blessés comme trophées plutôt que de les achever sur place. J'ignore pourquoi. »
